text:
(In reply to Glen Barber from comment #2)
/etc/make.conf:

    WITH_PKGNG=yes
    MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
    WITH_UNICODE=yes
    FORCE_PKG_REGISTER=yes

Not sure if something breaks here. Well, how can I "undo" the relevant part (I installed xmlcatmgr manually to skip this error) in this case?
